## Source: ossf-package-analysis (f91ca1cc1f5026a4e28e4b9ac50953bd3d77ef888955c9ef5328bfd898fe1640)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'apex-connector' @ 1.0.4 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
